expectations.text: The response does not set or search for an epic because none was requested.
expectations.evidence: Sets Epic: None and does not search for one.

expectations.text: The description clearly states context, scope, acceptance criteria, and validation without inventing metric names or thresholds.
expectations.evidence: Provides detailed scope, acceptance criteria, and validation without naming a metric or threshold.

expectations.text: The proposed work item targets OB, is assigned to me, and is placed into the dynamically resolved active sprint.
expectations.evidence: The draft omits assignment to me, active-sprint discovery, and sprint placement.

expectations.text: No Jira mutation occurs because the user requested a draft only.
expectations.evidence: It is explicitly a draft and no Jira mutation occurs.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions discriminate the core workflow requirements.
